title: macos-installer: bundle krunkit
body:
Extend Makefile and package.sh to download, sign and bundle krunkit and its dependencies into the package.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: CI is happy, and changes look fine so LGTM from me FWIW. But, I'll defer to @ashley-cui as I have no idea about macos installer.
